person.name: Essulf Ulfsson

memoryArtifacts.headline: Birkin Family Tree, Book 'Early Yorkshire Charters, Book ‘Early Yorkshire Charters Vol 3’, Page 359

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography
Name«/b»
Essulf de Birkin

«b»1092 Estimated Birth Year«/b»
The reign of Stephen, referred to below, was 1135 to 1154. His son is referenced as an adult at the beginning of this period if not before. Therefore, make his son Peter aged 21 in 1135, which would give him a birth year of 1114. Further, give Essulf a marriage the prior year, 1113, and have him be aged 21 at the time, for an estimated birth year of 1092.

«b»1135 Knights Fee and Death«/b»
'In the reign of Stephen, if not earlier, Peter son of Asolf, or Adam de Birkin, his son (mentioned in our earlier arguments about name changes) had been enfeoffed, possibly by Adam son of Swane, of a knight's fee in Havercroft, Stainborough, Lepton, Mirfield, Shitlington and Flockton'.

If his son Peter held the property at the beginning of Stephen's reign, 1135, this suggests that Essulf himself had died prior to 1135.

«b»Issue«/b»
1.) Peter de Birkin. Estimated birth 1114. Peter died before 1143.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Essulf Ulfsson於大約1100年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，他的父親Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill27歲，母親Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel22歲。他和Maud FitzUlf至少有6個兒子。他去世於大約1189年在他的家鄉享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Essulf Ulfsson于大约1100年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill27岁，母亲Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel22岁。他和Maud FitzUlf至少有6个儿子。他去世于大约1189年在他的家乡享年91岁。

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Essulf Ulfsson was born about 1100, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, his father, Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill, was 27 and his mother, Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, was 22. He had at least 6 sons with Maud FitzUlf. He died about 1189, in his hometown, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Essulf Ulfsson est né environ 1100, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Maud FitzUlf. Il est décédé environ 1189, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Essulf Ulfsson um 1100 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill 27 und seine Mutter Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel 22. Er hatte mit Maud FitzUlf mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb um 1189 im Alter von 91 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Essulf Ulfsson è nato il circa 1100 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Maud FitzUlf. Morì circa 1189, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Essulf Ulfssonが約1100年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhillは27歳，母Mrs. Ulf FitzGamelは22歳であった。彼はMaud FitzUlfとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1189年に故郷で91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Essulf Ulfsson(이)가 대략 1100년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Maud FitzUlf(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1189년 그의 고향에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Essulf Ulfsson nasceu aproximadamente 1100, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Maud FitzUlf. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1189, em sua cidade natal, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Essulf Ulfsson родился около 1100 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Maud FitzUlf. Он умер около 1189 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Essulf Ulfsson nació aproximadamente 1100, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ulf fitz Gamel of Thornhill, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ulf FitzGamel, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Maud FitzUlf. Murió aproximadamente 1189, en su pueblo, a la edad de 91 años.
